group.pph.label: Hospitality
group.pph.title: Penta P Huai Muang
group.pph.description: A hospitality experience shaped by comfort, attentive service, and details that make every visit feel effortless.

group.ppr.title: Penta P Residence

group.ppw.label: Warehouse
group.ppw.title: Penta P Warehouse 1

group.ppw2.label: Warehouse
group.ppw2.title: Penta P Warehouse 2
group.ppw2.description: Additional warehouse space designed to increase storage capability and support higher-volume operations with consistent reliability.

• Fully furnished with both built-in & standalone furniture
  • Bed & mattress
  • Dining table
  • Sofa / couch

Kitchen

  • Induction stove
  • Range hood
  • Microwave
  • Fridge

room.ppr.desc.2:
Safety & Privacy

  • Key card to access the building
  • All units installed with digital lock
  • Remote control for front gate
  • Front gate is always closed
  • Security guard
  • CCTV — surveillance cameras all around the property
